name: UBA : Potential Lateral Movement
notes: Detection of potential lateral movement based on machine learning analysis of internal destination ip, port and network zone usage. The settings for the number of events and the amount of time for the events should be edited to fit the environment. Be sure to enable the Lateral Movement models in the Machine Learning application.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM Sense

when the event QID is one of the following (104000128) UBA : Abnormal usage of internal asset, (104000129) UBA : Increased activity to internal destination port, (104000139) UBA : Unusual network zone access, (104000171) UBA : First time access to network zone, (104000170) UBA : First time access to internal destination port, (104000142) UBA : New internal asset used
when at least 2 events are seen with the same Username in 24 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Username in 24 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Potential Lateral Movement on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM Sense

AND when the event QID is one of the following (104000128) UBA : Abnormal usage of internal asset, (104000129) UBA : Increased activity to internal destination port, (104000139) UBA : Unusual network zone access, (104000171) UBA : First time access to network zone, (104000170) UBA : First time access to internal destination port, (104000142) UBA : New internal asset used
AND when at least 2 events are seen with the same Username in 24 hour(s)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Potential Lateral Movement
